creator: Giacomo.Mariani@die191.ing.unibo.it
text:
This is the upgrade (diff) for the x11-wm/fvwm-crystal to version 3.0.5.
The differences are only in Makefile and pkg-plist.
The attacched was generated from:
# diff -ruN fvwm-crystal.bak fvwm-crystal > fvwm-crystal.diff
# cat fvwm-crystal.diff | compress | uuencode fvwm-crystal.diff.Z > uuencode fvwm-crystal.diff.Z
